comments:
Kitchen accessories, Storage and Decor
———
-Vishesh Jain is owner of Clazkit - started in 2018
- ⁠Based out of Mumbai
- ⁠Product basket - bakeware, stainless steel chopping board, silicon spatula, plastic containers 
- Dealer distributor set up
- Also the owner of Manali Digi Commerce Pvt Ltd - which acts as an e-commerce distribution platform
- Manali serves as e-commerce partner for 30+ brands (Pidilite, Vipro, Ganesh Kitchenware, Tossaa, etc) 
- Clazkit also sells its products to Manali 
- Manali sells to Amazon(Retail EZ) and Qcomm - B2B 
- (Overall) Manali Digi Commerce Scale: FY25 Rev: 130-140 crs, GM: 5% and PAT%: 2-3% 
- Expects to close FY26 on 160-170 crs with similar margins 
- Clazkit FY25 Rev: 20+crs, GM: 20-25% & PAT: 2-3%
